title: biscutella auriculata var. balearica
intro: Biscutella auriculata var. balearica, also known as the Balearic biscutella, is a plant species within the family Brassicaceae. It is native to the Balearic Islands and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Biscutella auriculata var. balearica can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
